text: And the second day was the live surgery.
The live surgery was very difficult, so we had two extremely difficult cases.
known big lymph nodes and they were calcified and big and hard and it was very difficult to dissect this case but the patients done well.
We were safe all the time and I think for the participants it was really a good thing to see.
So we try to teach them step by step how to do a lobectomy
